articles.title: GCCH USERS ONLY - Microsoft 365 Outlook Copilot - FAQ
steps: Confirm you are on a GCCH tenant and licensed for Copilot.
Verify Outlook is updated to the latest supported build.
Sign out and sign back into Microsoft 365.
If Copilot still does not appear, contact IT with your Outlook version.

articles.title: [Email Security] I do not receive emails from outside of GE Vernova
symptoms: Sender says email was sent but I never got it
steps: Check Junk Email folder and Quarantine notifications in Microsoft 365 security portal.
Ask the sender to verify the exact recipient address (no typos, correct domain).
Confirm the sender domain is not blocked by organizational security policy.
If mail is quarantined, release it or request an allow-list via IT security.

articles.title: [Email] - Create a New Distribution List
steps: Open the distribution list request portal or service catalog.
Provide list name, owners, and members.
Submit the request and wait for approval/provisioning.
Verify the new DL appears in Outlook address book after sync.

articles.title: Manage an Existing Group and Distribution List in Outlook
steps: Identify whether the group is M365 Group or classic DL.
Use Outlook or Admin portal to manage owners/members.
Allow up to 24 hours for directory sync.
Confirm changes in Global Address List.

articles.title: [Email] Dynamic Distribution Group (DDG) management
steps: Review DDG membership rules with the group owner.
Confirm user attributes match DDG filter criteria.
Allow directory sync cycle to complete.
Escalate to messaging team if membership remains incorrect.

articles.title: [Email] How to download the Offline Address Book (OAB)
steps: In Outlook, go to Send/Receive > Download Address Book.
Choose the correct Offline Address Book for your organization and click OK.
Restart Outlook if the download does not complete within 30 minutes.
Check network/VPN if OAB download repeatedly fails.

articles.title: [Email] Access Multiple Mailboxes
steps: Confirm you have Full Access permission to the mailbox (request via service catalog if needed).
Outlook: File > Account Settings > Account Settings > select account > Change > More Settings > Advanced > Add.
Enter the mailbox SMTP address and click OK. Restart Outlook.
If mailbox still missing after 24h, verify permissions and check automapping (GEVKB0020025).

articles.title: [Email] Users outside of GE Vernova do not receive my emails
steps: Check for non-delivery report (NDR) details.
Verify recipient address and attachment size limits.
Remove blocked content or large attachments if applicable.
Contact IT with NDR message if issue persists.

articles.title: [Email] How to share a mailbox or access a shared mailbox
steps: Request Full Access and Send As permissions via service catalog.
After approval, add mailbox in Outlook account settings.
Allow time for permissions to replicate.
Use Send As only if explicitly granted.

articles.title: [Email] View the size of your Email and the Mailbox Quota
steps: In Outlook Web, open Settings > General > Storage.
Review largest folders and items; empty Deleted Items.
Move old mail to Online Archive if licensed.
Request quota increase only if business justified after cleanup.

articles.title: [Email] Email Signature management, including images etc.
steps: Outlook > File > Options > Mail > Signatures.
Create or edit signature; use hosted image URLs where possible (avoid large embedded images).
Assign signature to new messages and replies/forwards.
Test by sending to yourself and verify images load for external recipients.

articles.title: [Email] Configure Outlook and Sync your mailbox
steps: Ensure stable network or VPN connection. Disconnect and reconnect VPN if mail stopped after network change.
Verify account credentials and complete MFA when prompted.
Check the Outlook status bar (bottom) for Disconnected or Need Password errors.
Run Send/Receive > Send/Receive All Folders.
If folders are stale, right-click folder > Properties > Clear Offline Items, then Update Folder.
If sync still fails, run Office Quick Repair or recreate the Outlook profile.

articles.title: [Email] Use the Outlook Web access (OWA) and Mobile clients
steps: Use https://outlook.office.com for web access.
Install Microsoft Outlook app from official App Store or Google Play.
Sign in with corporate credentials and complete MFA.
Allow mailbox sync on mobile device when prompted by MDM policy.

articles.title: [Email] Use Microsoft Outlook Classic vs New Outlook
steps: Use the New Outlook toggle in the upper-right corner to switch between Classic and New Outlook.
Compare feature availability — New Outlook does not support COM add-ins.
If a required feature is missing (rules, PST, advanced search), revert to Classic Outlook.
Report blocking gaps to IT with your Outlook version and build number.

articles.title: [Email] How to open a Shared Calendar
steps: Confirm calendar sharing permission with owner (at least Reviewer or Editor).
Outlook Calendar > Open Calendar > From Address Book.
Select shared calendar and click OK.
Allow sync time; restart Outlook if calendar not visible after 15 minutes.

articles.title: [Email] Create an Out-of-Office (OOF) Message
steps: Outlook > File > Automatic Replies.
Enable automatic replies and set start/end date range.
Compose separate internal and external messages if required by policy.
Save and test with a colleague outside your team.

articles.title: [Email] How to use the Global Address List (GAL)
steps: Open Address Book in Outlook.
Select Global Address List as source.
Search by name or email.
Download OAB if results seem outdated.

articles.title: [Email] How to use Outlook Rules
steps: Home > Rules > Manage Rules & Alerts.
Create rule with clear conditions and actions.
Enable rule and choose Run on existing items if needed.
Check rule order — first matching rule wins when multiple rules apply.

articles.title: [Email] How to recall a sent email
steps: Open Sent Items and double-click the message.
Message > Actions > Recall This Message.
Choose delete unread copies option.
Recall works only for internal unread mail; not guaranteed.

articles.title: [Email] Export or backup your Mailbox
steps: File > Open & Export > Import/Export.
Choose Export to a file > Outlook Data File (.pst).
Select folders to export.
Store PST per data retention policy.

articles.title: [Email] Open shared Public folders in Microsoft Outlook
steps: Confirm public folder permissions.
Outlook > Folder Pane > enable Public Folders if available.
Expand public folder hierarchy.
Contact IT if public folders are not visible in tenant.

articles.title: [Email] Use Microsoft Outlook Contacts
steps: Open People view in Outlook.
New Contact to add manually.
Import contacts via CSV if migrating.
Verify default contact folder location.

articles.title: [Email] Use Microsoft Outlook Contact Groups
steps: People > New Contact Group.
Add members from address book or contacts.
Save group with descriptive name.
Use group name in To field when sending.

articles.title: [Email] How to add or remove additional mailboxes
steps: File > Account Settings > select account > Change > More Settings > Advanced.
Add or remove additional mailboxes.
Restart Outlook.
Confirm permissions if mailbox does not appear.
